name: Snyk breadth — hardcoded credentials in a database connection string

provenance.note: Constructed snippet illustrating hardcoded credentials — a postgres:// connection URI with an inline user:password literal in source. Breadth supplement (spec §4.3) — lower realism, not an external-validity claim.

notes: Vulnerable (+) side passes 'postgres://admin:S3cr3tP4ss@db.internal:5432/app' to createPool; safe (-) side reads process.env.DATABASE_URL. URI literal with :password@ (8-char password) is a TP per B-10.
